etimesWhy Mawlynnong, Asia’s Cleanest Village, won’t allow tourists on SundaysMawlynnong, Asia's Cleanest Village, now reserves Sundays for its residents. Starting January 2026, tourists cannot visit on this day. This allows villagers to enjoy family time and religious observances. Other days remain open for visitors to experience the unique culture and natural beauty. This change ensures the village's peaceful coexistence of tradition and daily life.

etimesViral thread lists ‘30 things to do with your parents before time moves on’; internet gets emotionalA poignant X thread by Cooper Baggs, "Your Parents Are Getting Older," urges readers to cherish simple moments with aging parents. It highlights recording voices, capturing laughter, and preserving handwriting. The post encourages deep conversations about dreams and struggles, and emphasizes spending quality time through shared meals and quiet company.
